texto: They tell us that Suicide is the greatest piece of Cowardice... That Suicide is wrong
autor: when it is quite obvious that there is nothing in this world to which every man has a more unassailable title than to his own life and person.
explicacao: Citação de when it is quite obvious that there is nothing in this world to which every man has a more unassailable title than to his own life and person. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They tell us that Suicide is the greatest piece of Cowardice... That Suicide is wrong” articula reflexao, arthur-schopenhauer, suicide em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
